Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance For Write Of Attachment
Off Calendar Feb-03-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES (CourtCall):

Paymon Hifai, (925)943-6570 - appearing on behalf of plaintiff G & G Partners, L.P.

Adam C. Dawson, (415)954-4928 - appearing on behalf of defendant American Conservatory Theater

After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF G & G PARTNERS, L.P.'s, Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance For Writ Of Attachment is GRANTED as requested. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
